name: ASRock B660M PRO RS Micro ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - Intel B660 Chipset - Support DDR4-4800(OC) - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 3.0 x16 - 2x M.2 Slots - M.2 Key-E for WiFi - USB 3.2 Gen1 - HDMI - DisplayPort - Intel Gigabit LAN
shortName: ASRock B660M PRO RS Micro ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - Intel
description: Micro ATX Intel B660 motherboard for LGA 1700 CPUs with PCIe 4.0 and DDR4-4800 support.
